name: Greenpill Impact Framework
summary: Public impact verification and capital-formation framework connected to Green Goods.
description: The public companion thread frames the Greenpill Impact Framework as a way to connect Green Goods v1, impact, strategy, measurement, coordination, and capital formation. Internal framework details shaped the research artifact, but launch copy should point to the public Hub thread unless stewards approve more.

seo.title: Greenpill Impact Framework · Greenpill Network
seo.description: The Greenpill Impact Framework connects public impact verification, Green Goods, and regenerative capital coordination.
